<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v2-main -->

# 🚀 Pydantic AI V2 Beta 4 is here!

For more information on Pydantic AI V2, see the [Upgrade Guide](https://9a6d6eb5-pydantic-ai-previews.pydantic.workers.dev/changelog/).

Beta 4 turns the V1 deprecation warning for prepare-callback `None` returns into a hard `TypeError`, and pulls in two V1 releases on top — [v1.103.0](https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/releases/tag/v1.103.0) and [v1.104.0](https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/releases/tag/v1.104.0):

## What's Changed
### 🚀 Features
* Add `list_prompts` and `get_prompt` functionality to `McpServer` by @bdore in https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/pull/3889
* Round-trip message timestamps through `VercelAIAdapter`'s `UIMessage.metadata` by @Genmin in https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/pull/5279
* Support `anthropic_eager_input_streaming` in `OpenRouterModel` by @Alex-Resch in https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/pull/5656
* Drop `None` returns from tool prepare callbacks by @adtyavrdhn in https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/pull/5668
* Add Claude Opus 4.8 support by @dsfaccini in https://github.com/pydantic/pydantic-ai/
